mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_recognition_record ( task_no, doc_type, source_file_name, source_file_path, recognition_status, supplier_name, raw_text, warnings_json, result_json, error_message, confirmed_order_id, created_by ) VALUES ( #{taskNo}, #{docType}, #{sourceFileName}, #{sourceFilePath}, #{recognitionStatus}, #{supplierName}, #{rawText}, #{warningsJson}, #{resultJson}, #{errorMessage}, #{confirmedOrderId}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_no, doc_type, source_file_name, source_file_path, recognition_status, supplier_name, raw_text, warnings_json, result_json, error_message, confirmed_order_id, created_by, created_time, updated_time FROM ai_recognition_record WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, task_no, doc_type, source_file_name, source_file_path, recognition_status, supplier_name, raw_text, warnings_json, result_json, error_message, confirmed_order_id, created_by, created_time, updated_time FROM ai_recognition_record WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE

SELECT id, task_no, doc_type, source_file_name, source_file_path, recognition_status, supplier_name, raw_text, warnings_json, result_json, error_message, confirmed_order_id, created_by, created_time, updated_time FROM ai_recognition_record WHERE task_no = #{taskNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_recognition_record WHERE doc_type = 'inbound'

SELECT air.id, air.task_no AS taskNo, air.source_file_name AS sourceFileName, air.supplier_name AS supplierName, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(air.result_json, '$.supplierMatchStatus')) AS supplierMatchStatus, air.recognition_status AS recognitionStatus, air.confirmed_order_id AS confirmedOrderId, io.order_no AS confirmedOrderNo, air.created_time AS createdTime FROM ai_recognition_record air LEFT JOIN inbound_order io ON air.confirmed_order_id = io.id WHERE air.doc_type = 'inbound' ORDER BY air.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_recognition_record WHERE doc_type = 'outbound'

SELECT air.id, air.task_no AS taskNo, air.source_file_name AS sourceFileName, air.supplier_name AS customerName, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(air.result_json, '$.customerMatchStatus')) AS customerMatchStatus, air.recognition_status AS recognitionStatus, air.confirmed_order_id AS confirmedOrderId, oo.order_no AS confirmedOrderNo, air.created_time AS createdTime FROM ai_recognition_record air LEFT JOIN outbound_order oo ON air.confirmed_order_id = oo.id WHERE air.doc_type = 'outbound' ORDER BY air.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_recognition_record SET recognition_status = #{recognitionStatus}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, supplier_name = #{supplierName}, raw_text = #{rawText}, warnings_json = #{warningsJson}, result_json = #{resultJson} WHERE id = #{id}
